api_key.description: Delighted API key, sent as the HTTP Basic auth username with a blank password. Never logged.

base_url.description: Delighted API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 timestamp or Unix-seconds lower bound for survey_responses/metrics; only records updated at or after this time are read. Legacy named this config key 'since' and also accepted a space/'T'-separated no-timezone datetime form; this bundle renames the key to start_date (matching this codebase's other unix_seconds+start_config_key bundles, e.g. stripe/chargebee/aircall) and accepts RFC3339 or Unix-seconds only (documented deviation/scope narrowing, see docs.md). The wire query parameter Delighted itself receives is still named 'since', unchanged.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
